verification_rules.expected_result: Evidence of implementation consistent with the control objective. Documentary proof of recommendation fulfilment. No contradictory evidence found during walkthrough.
verification_rules.reasoning: No deterministic machine-executable command is available for this 'Advisory' control. A structured manual inspection by an independent reviewer (Internal Audit or Compliance Officer) provides the best independent verification outside the implementing department.
